name: Braised Beans in Coconut Milk with Shiitake Mushrooms

ingredients.item: fresh (or dried, soaked for 8 to 10 hours and drained) lima beans
fresh (or dried, soaked for 8 to 10 hours and drained) pinto beans
dried shiitake mushrooms, soaked and large caps halved and small caps quartered
mature coconut meat (see Note), cut into thin, small slices
cube store-bought or homemade chao, mashed
toasted black sesame seeds, for garnish

method: Fill a large saucepan halfway with water and bring to a boil over high heat. Add beans and salt, reduce the heat to medium, and cook until softened (about 15 minutes). Drain and transfer to a bowl.

In a medium skillet, heat vegetable oil over low heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until slightly golden around the edges (about 30 seconds). Add mushrooms and soy sauce and stir well. Add cooked beans, coconut meat and milk, and stock powder, and continue to cook, stirring often, until bubbly (about 3 minutes).
Stir in ginger and chao and continue to cook on low heat, stirring often, until slightly thickened (5 to 10 minutes). Remove from heat.
Transfer to serving bowls and sprinkle with black sesame seeds.
